span.p:
DEFAULT
---
Ready to act
Passive shooter running
Intake deployed

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SHOOT_AT_HUB
---
Scoring at hub
Uses hub calculator

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SHOOT_AT_OUTPOST
---
Passing to outpost
Uses pass calculator

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AUTO_CYCLE_SHOOTING
---
Auto target selection
Hub or Outpost based on zone

span.p:
IDLE
---
All subsystems stopped
Disabled/test only

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Subsystems:
- TargetSelection -> AUTO
- ShooterStateMachine -> PASSIVE_SHOOTER
- IntakeStateMachine -> DEPLOYED
- HopperRoller -> OFF

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Shooting Sequence:
1. PREPARING_TO_FIRE
- Spin up flywheel/hood
- Wait for at setpoint
2. FIRING
- IntakeStateMachine -> AGITATING
- Indexer -> INDEXING
- HopperRoller -> ROLLING
